name: web-artifacts-builder
tagline: Scaffolds a React+Tailwind+shadcn/ui project and bundles it into a single self-contained HTML file for claude.ai artifacts.
verdict: Focused build-tool skill: clear scope, explicit negative trigger, legitimate tooling and sensible design guidance, no security red flags. Weak spots: step 2 points to a 'Common Development Tasks' section that does not exist anywhere in the file, leaving the core develop step unguided; no failure handling for the init/bundle scripts; no version or changelog.

highlights.summary: Step 2 defers the core develop step to a 'Common Development Tasks' section (line 43) that does not exist anywhere in the file.
No mention anywhere of what to do if init-artifact.sh, npm/parcel installs, or bundling fail — total silence on a multi-step external-tool flow.
Bundling overwrites bundle.html safely, but re-running init-artifact.sh against an existing project directory is never addressed.
